FHI-aims
========

# Available modules


The overview below shows which FHI-aims installations are available per HPC-UGent Tier-2 cluster, ordered based on software version (new to old).

To start using FHI-aims, load one of these modules using a `module load` command like:

```shell
module load FHI-aims/260331-intel-2024a
```

*(This data was automatically generated on {{modules_last_updated}})*
